caption: A woman with black hair and glasses stands against a plain black background. She wears a light green, long-sleeved blouse adorned with small red floral patterns and an embroidered neckline, paired with a dark bead necklace. A small lapel microphone is clipped to the center of her garment. In the bottom-left corner of each scene, a small circular logo is visible with the text "NPTEL" printed beside it. As the sequence progresses, the woman speaks and uses hand gestures to emphasize her points. Initially, her hands are raised and open in front of her chest. She then briefly lowers her arms, bringing her hands closer to her body, before raising them again with palms facing inward, gesturing outward away from her torso. Her facial expression remains focused and communicative throughout the clip.
